zh.Evangelisch,Gangloff,Pfalz,Bavaria: 德國貝也藍德可萊斯 庫瑟爾岡格洛夫
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joh. Daniel Mohr於1767年6月16日出生在德國貝也普法爾茲時，他的父親John Peter Mohr29歲，母親Anna Margaret Mohr28歲。他於1791年7月10日與Anna Maria Nagelin在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 庫瑟爾岡格洛夫結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joh. Daniel Mohr于1767年6月16日出生在德国貝也普法爾茲时，他的父亲John Peter Mohr29岁，母亲Anna Margaret Mohr28岁。他于1791年7月10日与Anna Maria Nagelin在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 庫瑟爾岡格洛夫结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Mohr
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: North German: topographic name for someone who lived in a fen, Middle Low German mōr.
German, Jewish (Ashkenazic), Danish, and Dutch (of German origin): nickname for a man of swarthy complexion, from Middle High German mōr, German Mohr, and Middle Dutch moor ‘Moor’.
German: from a short form of an old personal name, Morhart (see Morath ).

variants.name: Mor
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Ari, Arie, Avi, Eliezer, Erez, Etty, Haim, Hedva, Ilan, Itai, Moshe, Noam.
Jewish (Israeli): shortened and Hebraicized form of some original Ashkenazic surname starting in Mor-.

variants.name: Morath
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Camille, Gaston.  German Erhardt, Kurt.
South German: from the ancient Germanic personal name Morhart (see Morhardt ). This surname is also found in France (Alsace).

variants.name: Moerke
meanings: German (Mörke): variant of Möhrke, from a diminutive of Mohr .

nameMeanings.name: Joh.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Simplified spelling of   John   or a short form of   Jonathan .  The name is borne by the Canadian singer  Jon Vickers  (  b. 1926 ) and the American actor  Jon Voight  (  b. 1938 ).

variants.name: Jonathan
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘God has given’, composed of the same elements as those of   Matthew  , but in reverse order. This is the name of several characters in the Bible, most notably a son of King Saul, who was a devoted friend and supporter of the young David, even when David and Saul were themselves at loggerheads (1 Samuel 31; 2 Samuel 1:19–26). The name is often taken as symbolic of steadfast friendship and loyalty. Well-known bearers of the name include the Irish clergyman and writer  Jonathan Swift  (  1667-1745 ), British theatre director  Jonathan Miller  (  b. 1934 ), British actor  Jonathan Pryce  (  b. 1947 ), and British television presenter  Jonathan Ross  (  b. 1960 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

nameMeanings.name: Daniel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘God is my judge’ in Hebrew), borne by the prophet whose story is told in the Book of Daniel. He was an Israelite slave of the Assyrian king Nebuchadnezzar, who obtained great favour through his skill in interpreting dreams and the ‘writing on the wall’ at the feast held by Nebuchadnezzar's son Belshazzar. His enemies managed to get him cast into a lions' den, but he was saved by God. This was a favourite tale in the Middle Ages, often represented in miracle plays. The name has been perennially popular among English speakers since the 16th century and has been particularly favoured since the 1980s.

historicEvents.title: Germans defeat Napolean in Leipzig
historicEvents.description: On Oct 19, 1813, Germany defeats Napolean. The commanding officer for the Allied side was Prince Karl Phillipp Schwarzenberg.
The Congress of Vienna established the German Confederation of 39 independent German states.

historicEvents.title: The Book of Mormon Published in German
historicEvents.description: On May 25, 1852, the Book of Mormon is published in German.
historicEvents.urlTitle: The Book of Mormon Published in German

historicEvents.description: War: Prussia and Austria vs. Denmark.

en.lifeSummary: When Joh. Daniel Mohr was born on 16 June 1767, in Palatinate, Bavaria, Germany, his father, John Peter Mohr, was 29 and his mother, Anna Margaret Mohr, was 28. He married Anna Maria Nagelin on 10 July 1791, in Gangloff, Kusel, Bavaria, Germany. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joh. Daniel Mohr est né le 16 juin 1767, à Pfalz, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, John Peter Mohr, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Anna Margaret Mohr, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Anna Maria Nagelin le 10 juillet 1791, à Gangloff, Landkreis Kusel, Bayern, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joh. Daniel Mohr am 16. Juni 1767 in Pfalz, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Peter Mohr 29 und seine Mutter Anna Margaret Mohr 28. Er hat am 10. Juli 1791 in Gangloff, Landkreis Kusel, Bayern, Deutschland Anna Maria Nagelin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joh. Daniel Mohr è nato il il 16 giugno 1767 nel Pfalz, Bayern, Germania, il suo padre, John Peter Mohr, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Anna Margaret Mohr, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Anna Maria Nagelin il 10 luglio 1791, nel Gangloff, Landkreis Kusel, Bayern, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Joh. Daniel Mohrが1767年6月16日にドイツバイエルンプファルズで生まれた時，父John Peter Mohrは29歳，母Anna Margaret Mohrは28歳であった。1791年7月10日にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス クセルガングロッフでAnna Maria Nagelinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Joh. Daniel Mohr(이)가 1767년 6월 16일 독일 베이른 p팔즈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Peter Mohr(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Anna Margaret Mohr(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1791년 7월 10일 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 쿠셀 갱글로프에서 Anna Maria Nagelin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joh. Daniel Mohr родился 16 июня 1767 г. в местности пфалз, беиирн, Германия, его отцу по имени John Peter Mohr было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Margaret Mohr, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Maria Nagelin 10 июля 1791 г. в местности ганглофф, ландкрис кусел, беиирн, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери.
